description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical beer can with a matte turquoise exterior and a silver top. The can features bold, uppercase black text wrapping around the upper portion, with the word 'ESQUADRÃO' prominently displayed. A stylized cartoon character with short blonde hair, black suit, and black wings is illustrated on the front, adding a playful and modern touch. The lower part of the can includes the name 'NEELIE' in smaller black text. The can's surface appears smooth and metallic, typical of aluminum beverage cans. The overall design is clean, with a focus on the central character and minimal background distractions.
description: A tall turquoise beer can with a silver top, bold black text, and a cartoon winged character on the front. The design is modern and playful with a smooth metallic finish.
description_view_0: The can is mostly turquoise with partial black text visible, and the silver top is clearly seen.
description_view_1: The word 'ESQUA' is visible at the top, with part of the winged character's wing coming into view.
description_view_2: The front of the can shows the full cartoon character with wings and the word 'QUADRÃO' above.
description_view_3: The text 'RÃO Z' and 'NEELIE' are visible, with the edge of the character's wing on the left.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features a turquoise background with bold black uppercase text and a central cartoon character with wings. The design is clean and modern, with minimal background elements and a focus on playful illustration.
